mimo-copilot.walkthrough.title: MiMo for Copilot Chat
mimo-copilot.walkthrough.description: Set up MiMo models in Copilot Chat.
mimo-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.title: Set your MiMo API key
mimo-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.descr:
[Get an API key](command:mimo-copilot.getApiKey) from platform.xiaomimimo.com.
[Set API Key](command:mimo-copilot.setApiKey)
mimo-copilot.walkthrough.showModels.desc:
If the models are hidden, open VS Code's Language Models manager and show the MiMo models.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
mimo-copilot.walkthrough.advancedSetting:
Customize providers and model names, configure the vision proxy, enable experimental settings, and more in the extension settings.
[Open settings](command:mimo-copilot.openSettings)
mimo-copilot.config.title: MiMo Copilot
mimo-copilot.config.maxTokens.descriptio: Maximum number of output tokens per request. Set to 0 to use the API default (no limit). Useful for controlling costs.
mimo-copilot.config.experimental.stabili:
**Experimental**: improve MiMo context-cache hit rate by pre-activating available tools.
- When the enabled tools list changes across turns, this may improve MiMo context-cache hit rate.
- Requests will include more function definitions, so input tokens may increase. Cache-hit input tokens are billed at a lower price, but still count toward usage.
- This may add internal preflight tool calls to the current Copilot chat history. If you switch to another model in the same conversation, that model provider may reject or mishandle the replayed history. Start a new chat if model switching behaves unexpectedly.

Use [Configure Tools](command:workbench.action.chat.configureTools) to **view and manage** your tool list:

- 64 or fewer enabled tools: usually no need to enable this unless the tool list still changes across turns.
- More than 128 enabled tools: not recommended. MiMo supports at most 128 functions in one `tools` request. Consider disabling tools you rarely use.
mimo-copilot.config.debugMode.descriptio:
Controls what diagnostic information MiMo Copilot writes. Token usage is always reported to Copilot regardless of this setting.

- **Minimal** — Token usage only. No diagnostic logs or request dumps.
- **Metadata** — Privacy-safe diagnostic metadata (request hashes, prefix overlap, tool schema changes). Does not contain prompt text — safe to share in public issue reports. View with [`MiMo: Show Logs`](command:mimo-copilot.showLogs).
- **Verbose** — Complete request payloads written to disk for local debugging. **Warning: contains sensitive prompt content.** View with [`MiMo: Open Request Dumps Folder`](command:mimo-copilot.openRequestDumpsFolder).
mimo-copilot.config.debugMode.minimal.de: Token usage only. No diagnostic logs or dumps.
mimo-copilot.config.debugMode.metadata.d: Privacy-safe metadata. Safe to share publicly. View with `MiMo: Show Logs`.
mimo-copilot.config.debugMode.verbose.de: ⚠️ Contains sensitive prompt content. For local debugging only.
mimo-copilot.config.modelIdOverrides.des: Override the API model ID sent for each MiMo model. Defaults are prefilled with official MiMo IDs; change them only when using a compatible third-party API that uses different model names.
mimo-copilot.config.modelIdOverrides.mim: API model ID for MiMo V2.5 Pro
API model ID for MiMo V2 Pro
API model ID for MiMo V2.5 Omni
API model ID for MiMo V2 Omni
API model ID for MiMo V2 Flash
mimo-copilot.config.visionModel.descript: Model ID for vision proxy (describes images for text-only MiMo models). Leave empty for auto-detection. Use 'MiMo: Set Vision Proxy Model' command to pick one from a list.
mimo-copilot.config.visionPrompt.descrip: Prompt sent to the vision proxy model when describing image attachments before forwarding them to MiMo.
